programmes.show_description: No excuses, stop what you are doing, turn it up and party hard with the biggest anthems and classic tracks of the noughties!
Fancy a mash up after midnight? Only massive, ad free anthems to help with your insomnia! More beats, less sleep!
Need a fix of 90s club classics? Lock in for a marathon of memories as we take you back to the greatest decade of dance! The 90s!
Relive the decade of big-room bangers and the hottest Club belters from 2010 to 2019. Get ready to burn up the carpet and dance yourself silly!
Join Stephanie Hirst as she reveals Clubland's All Time 40! With iconic dancefloor legends, hands in the air anthems and infinitely catchy earworms. It's all here.
Superstar DJ Judge Jules passes Judgement on the state of dance music. Today he's putting the case forward for which is the best 90s dance tune of all time!
Need a fix of 90s club classics? Lock in for a marathon of memories as we take you back to the greatest decade of dance! The 90s!
The 25 biggest Eurodance smashes of all time. Gala, Gina G, Urban Cookie Collective, Livin' Joy, Culture Beat and so many more. Don't miss this!
Kiss FM favourite Bam Bam is back once again, firing up 25 of the greatest dance covers ever to grace a dance floor! Featuring Eric Prydz, DJ Sammy and Jonas Blue!

programmes.show_name: Take Me To The Clouds Above!
programmes.show_description: The sound that started it all! Join us for a selection of legendary Clubland classics. Expect high-energy beats, the biggest vocal anthems and feel good party vibe for all!
The definitive floorfillers from '95 to '99, a time when stomping beats and euphoric breakdowns ruled. Fasten your seatbelts and hold on tight, it's going to get bumpy!
He may be a legendary CBBC presenter, an Ibiza DJ and Heart's dance master but today Toby Anstis is Clubland TV's total authority on euphoric dance. Hands in the air for this one!
Fancy a mash up after midnight? Only massive, ad free anthems to help with your insomnia! More beats, less sleep!
Let's go way back with some classic throwback hits, long forgotten beats and some good old fashioned rave anthems!
Join Stephanie Hirst as she spins some awesome belters! From 1990 to 1999 here's the lowdown on her fav 3 tracks of each year.
Need a fix of 90s club classics? Lock in for a marathon of memories as we take you back to the greatest decade of dance! The 90s!
Starting in with the vinyl hits of 80s, the CD singles of the 90s, The downloads of the 2000s and finishing with today streaming hits. This is the evolution of dance!
We give you mega clubland classics, huge cheesy covers and massive party anthems. Dust off those vocal cords and grab the mic, it's The Big Fat Clubland Singalong!

programmes.show_name: 30 Years Ago! Wow Feeling Old Yet?
programmes.show_description: 30 years in the making, these are the biggest tracks from an incredible three decades ago! Expect Robert miles, Chicane, Underworld and The Prodigy! Feeling old yet?
Broom Cupboard legend and Heart Dance club maestro Toby Anstis presents his selection from an ultimate decade of dance - the 2010s!
We give you heavy hits, vocal anthems, dirty beats and bangin' basslines. This is the 2010s at it finest!
Build ups to die for, Breakdowns to cry for! These are the 50 biggest Euphoric tunes of all time. Turn this up and get ready for the drop!
Dive into a world of uplifting melodies, driving beats and breakdowns to give you shivers! This is Euphoria at its finest.
